clinity.title: Clinity
clinity.longDescription: Collaborating as Senior Full Stack Engineer, Architect, and Business Development at Clinity. Building the platform with Next.js, focusing on scalable architecture and strategic growth.

rmp-lowcode.title: RunMyProcess Low-Code Platform
rmp-lowcode.description: Enterprise low-code platform with rendering engine and 50+ custom components.
rmp-lowcode.longDescription: Led the complete redesign of the RunMyProcess platform with a focus on scalable architecture, user experience, and performance. Developed and integrated components for the rendering engine, improving page load times by 35% and reducing visual rendering errors by 40%. Optimized the internal low-code platform reducing bugs by 25% and build performance by 20%.

veritran-platform.title: VeriTran Financial Platform
veritran-platform.description: Low-code platform for financial institutions with real-time features.
veritran-platform.longDescription: Enhanced a low-code platform serving financial institutions using React.js and TypeScript. Contributed to transitioning from pure JavaScript to a component-based architecture. Integrated WebSockets for real-time communication. Built visual construction tools including drag & drop guides and zoom-based component adjustments. Improved performance via code splitting.

mudanzas-pereira.title: Mudanzas Pereira
mudanzas-pereira.description: Landing page for a moving services company in Pereira, Colombia.
mudanzas-pereira.longDescription: Designed and developed a professional landing page for a local moving company. Focused on SEO optimization, fast load times, and a clear call-to-action to drive customer inquiries.

copairo.title: Copairo
copairo.description: Web platform for Copairo brand and services.
copairo.longDescription: Built the web presence for Copairo, delivering a modern and responsive experience that highlights the brand identity and services offered.

pirogramei.title: Pirogramei
pirogramei.description: Web project showcasing Pirogramei content and services.
pirogramei.longDescription: Developed a static site for Pirogramei with a focus on clean design, accessibility, and fast performance using GitHub Pages for hosting.

cafe-independencia.title: Café Independencia
cafe-independencia.description: Website for a local coffee shop showcasing their menu and story.
cafe-independencia.longDescription: Created a visually appealing website for Café Independencia, highlighting their menu, story, and location. Built as a static site hosted on GitHub Pages.

cspereira.title: CS Pereira
cspereira.description: Web platform for CS Pereira organization.
cspereira.longDescription: Developed a web platform for CS Pereira, providing information about the organization and its activities. Hosted on GitHub Pages with a responsive design.

casa-asterion.title: Casa de Asterión Ediciones
casa-asterion.description: Website for an independent publishing house.
casa-asterion.longDescription: Built the web presence for Casa de Asterión Ediciones, an independent publishing house. The site showcases their catalog, authors, and editorial philosophy.

compiler-pl0.title: PL/0 Compiler in Python
compiler-pl0.description: Academic compiler implementation for the PL/0 programming language.
compiler-pl0.longDescription: Built a complete compiler for the PL/0 programming language in Python as part of systems engineering coursework. Implements lexical analysis, parsing, and code generation phases. A demonstration of computer science fundamentals and language theory.
